titleStmt.title: SII 24.115: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 115. (A.R. No. 40 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Records the sale deed of the transaction referred to in No. 114 above. The inscription is dated in the 8th year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
This is written in continuation of No. 114.pūmātu puṇara puvimaātu vaḷara nāmā
tu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa tantiru patumalar mannavar cūṭa manniya vurimaiyāl maṇi muṭi cūṭi ceṅkol ticai toṟum vaḷara veṅkali nikki meyyaṟattaḻaippak kaliṅkamiriyak kaṭamalai naṭātti valaṅkoḷḷāḻi varai yāḻi naṭātti Iru cuṭa raḷavum Oru kuṭai niḻaṟṟa cempon vīrasiṅhāsanattu mukkokkiḻānaṭika ḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāna tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī vik
kirama coḻa devaṟku yāṇṭu 8 Āvatu pāṇṭikulācani vaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkat tiruppatiyil Irukkum śrīvaiṣṇavaril cāntūr makiḻalaṅkāra dāsanum Entampi cikurukūr nampiyum Ivviruvom pāṇṭi kulācanivaḷanāṭṭu kiḷiyūr nāṭṭu puḷiyaṅkuṭaiyān Araiyan Ātittatevanāna Enāti Araiyaṟku nāṅkaḷ porumāvaṟuti paṇṇik kuṭutta paricāvatu nāṅkaḷ periya koyiṟ
paṇṇina ḷutāy varukiṟa tirunan=tavānattukku vaṭapāṟkellai tirunaṟaiyūr nātan tirunan=tavāna teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai nittavi nota mūventaveḷār tirunan=tavānam tiruviṇṇakar (nana) Itukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai tennāṟṟukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Āṉaiviṭaṅkaiyār tirunantavānattukku kiḻakkum Āka Ivvicain=ta perunānkellaikku Uḷppaṭṭa nilam mummāvarai Innilam mummāvarai
yilum mel kkina kiṇaṟum Akappaṭa viṟṟukkuṭuttu koḷḷa Emmi licainta vilaipporuḷ Anṟāṭu naṟkācu 8 Ikkācu Eṭṭum Āvaṇakkaḷiyile kaiccelakkāṭṭi poruḷaṟakkoṇṭu poruḷ māvaṟutip paṇṇik kuṭuttom Ippuḷiyaṅkuṭaiyān Araiyan Ātittatevanāna Ēnāti Araiyaṟku muṅkil kuṭic cāntūr makiḻalaṅkāradāsanum En tampi ci kurukūr nampiyum Ivviruvom Ivarkaḷ paṇikka
Ippo raṅkattu maddhyastan Ārāvamutu villiyāna patineṭṭu nāṭṭu śrī vaiyiṣṇavap piriyanen Ivai yenneḻuttu Ippaṭikku cāttūr śrī kurukūrnampi yeḻuttu Ippaṭikku mūṅkilkuṭi cāntūr makiḻalaṅkāra dāsanneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven kan=taṭait tirumaṅkaiyāḷi Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven perum puliyūr Āyānta n Āṇṭa piḷḷai Eḻuttu Ippaṭiyaṟiven koyi
rkaṇakku paravaicceri yāṇṭān sayiñai yā(ta)namaikku ci kulacekara Araiyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kākkaṇṭūr A nārāyaṇa paṭṭanenippaṭikku tirunaṟaiyūr tirukkaḻakaṇṭan neḻuttu Ippaṭikku mūṅkilkuṭic cāntūr malai n Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven tirunaṟaiyūr dāsanneḻuttu paḷḷi koṇṭā nārāyaṇan vāsutevan sayiñai yā(ta)namaikku tiruva
raṅka veḷān Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 24.115 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
